shot_type_and_framing: close-up shot centered vertically and horizontally focusing on the soap dispenser and container gift set wrapped in golden ribbon with an orange flower on top
camera_movement: slow lateral track from left to right to reveal texture and details on the carved containers and satin ribbon
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with medium focal length around 50mm, shallow depth of field softly blurring the warm background to isolate the subject
environment_description: warm, softly lit indoor setting featuring wooden furniture, beige curtains, a cream sofa, and greenery blurred in the background
subject_description: two ivory ceramic containers with a carved lattice pattern, one with a metal soap dispenser pump, tied together with glossy golden satin ribbons and topped with a single vibrant orange flower, placed on a matching ceramic tray
motion_behavior: natural, smooth, and realistic camera movement with no subject motion
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, warm, and filmic with an elegant and cozy atmosphere
